Diseases

1structured record

disease

Green Poison

The engineered smallpox outbreak also called the Dollar Flu, whose Black Friday spread drives the collapse depicted across The Division franchise.

not applicablesource reviewed

Unofficial, source-led research into The Division universe and its real-world influences.
